inputs.name: in
inputs.label: Content
inputs.description: Text content to write to the file.

inputs.name: path
inputs.label: File Path Override
inputs.description: Overrides the configured file path at runtime.

outputs.name: out
outputs.label: Pass-through
outputs.description: The content that was written, passed unchanged for chaining.

outputs.name: path
outputs.label: Written Path
outputs.description: Absolute path of the file that was written.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: Error
outputs.description: Error message if the file could not be written.
